hero.name: Muhammad Asif Shahzad
hero.availability: Open to opportunities — Remote / Hybrid / Onsite

about.title: About Me
about.summary: Results-driven Technical Founder and Full-Stack Systems Architect with 25+ years of hands-on experience building scalable SaaS platforms, enterprise infrastructure, AI-assisted workflows, and business automation systems. Founder of MaxSolBiz IT Solutions. Equally at home architecting backend systems, engineering enterprise networks, or designing brand identities.
about.edu_2: Diploma in Graphic Design — University of the Punjab

projects.title: Projects
projects.p1_desc: Multi-role task/workflow SaaS with financial modules, voucher management, automation. Stack: Laravel, MySQL, REST API, AI workflows.
projects.p2_desc: Integrated financial system with transaction tracking, inventory sync, audit trails, automated reporting.
projects.p3_desc: End-to-end wireless, VPN, CCTV, fiber deployments. Stack: MikroTik, Ubiquiti, Cisco.
projects.p4_desc: Business automation: attendance, invoicing, POS, multi-dept dashboards. Stack: Excel VBA, Python.
projects.p5_desc: Custom platforms for data handling, analytics, user management, structured reporting.
projects.p6_desc: Industry-specific ERP and CRM builds for manufacturing, retail, logistics clients.
projects.p7_desc: Logo, branding, social media assets, marketing collateral for 50+ clients.
projects.p8_desc: Python/SQL pipelines for large-scale data cleaning, transformation, and reporting.

testimonials.title: Trust & Recognition
testimonials.t1_text: An exceptional technology partner. Asif delivered our custom ERP on time and within budget. Highly recommended.
testimonials.t2_text: Professional, reliable, and technically superb. Our network infrastructure has never been more stable.
testimonials.t3_text: Asif transformed our business processes with automation. Saved us hundreds of hours per month.
